positive: A mesmerizing geometric mountain range silhouette at sunset. The mountains are rendered in sharp, crystalline shapes, contrasting against a vibrant, gradient sky of deep indigo, burnt orange, and magenta. The composition should be highly symmetrical and centralized, maximizing visual impact for print. Include minimal, abstract celestial elements like scattered crescent moons and constellations. Use a stylized, retro-futuristic aesthetic with clean, defined edges and excellent contrast. The color palette must be limited to jewel tones and warm sunset gradients. Ideal for a distressed screen-print effect on apparel. Vector illustration quality, perfect for textile printing, high detail, crisp lines, flat graphic design.
negative: blurry, text, watermark, logo, copyright, noisy, low resolution, bad anatomy, deformed, multiple subjects, extra limbs, poorly rendered, grain, artifact
